zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Segrave於大約1275年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾查阿可姆時，她的父親John Segrave 2nd Baron Segrave20歲，母親Christian Plessis20歲。她於1297年與William de Ferrers 1st Lord Ferrers of Groby在英國萊希斯特斯爾格洛比結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1317年1月之前在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾格洛比，埋葬在英國萊希斯特斯爾格洛比聖 菲利普 安德 聖 加也 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Segrave于大约1275年出生在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾查阿可姆时，她的父亲John Segrave 2nd Baron Segrave20岁，母亲Christian Plessis20岁。她于1297年与William de Ferrers 1st Lord Ferrers of Groby在英国萊希斯特斯爾格洛比结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1317年1月之前在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾格洛比，埋葬在英国萊希斯特斯爾格洛比聖 菲利普 安德 聖 加也 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Segrave
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Seagrave
meanings: English: habitational name from Seagrave (Leicestershire), probably from Old English sēath ‘pit, hole’ + grāf ‘grove’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Segrave was born about 1275, in Chacombe, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Segrave 2nd Baron Segrave, was 20 and her mother, Christian Plessis, was 20. She married William de Ferrers 1st Lord Ferrers of Groby in 1297, in Groby, Leicestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died before January 1317, in Groby, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in St Philip and St James' Church, Groby, Leicestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Segrave est née environ 1275, à Chacombe, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Segrave 2nd Baron Segrave, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Christian Plessis, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé William de Ferrers 1st Lord Ferrers of Groby en 1297, à Groby, Leicestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée avant janvier 1317, à Groby, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à St Philip and St James' Church, Groby, Leicestershire, Angleterre.

Sie hat 1297 in Groby, Leicestershire, England William de Ferrers 1st Lord Ferrers of Groby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb vor Januar 1317 in Groby, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in St Philip and St James' Church, Groby, Leicestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Segrave è nata il circa 1275 nel Chacombe, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Segrave 2nd Baron Segrave, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Christian Plessis, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato William de Ferrers 1st Lord Ferrers of Groby nel 1297, nel Groby, Leicestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì prima del gennaio 1317, nel Groby, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a St Philip and St James' Church, Groby, Leicestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Segraveが約1275年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアチャコンベで生まれた時，父John Segrave 2nd Baron Segraveは20歳，母Christian Plessisは20歳であった。1297年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアグロビーでWilliam de Ferrers 1st Lord Ferrers of Grobyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1317年1月以前にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアグロビーで死去し，イギリスレアイセステルシュアイアグロビースト フィリップ アンド スト ジャムス' チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St Philip and St James Church, Groby, Le: 영국 레이스스터실르 그로비 스트 필립 앤드 스트 자메스' 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Segrave(이)가 대략 1275년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 차코브에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Segrave 2nd Baron Segrave(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Christian Plessis(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1297년 영국 레이스스터실르 그로비에서 William de Ferrers 1st Lord Ferrers of Groby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1317년 1월 이전 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 그로비에서 사망했으며 영국 레이스스터실르 그로비 스트 필립 앤드 스트 자메스' 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Segrave nasceu aproximadamente 1275, em Chacombe, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Segrave 2nd Baron Segrave, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Christian Plessis, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Ferrers 1st Lord Ferrers of Groby em 1297, em Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu antes janeiro de 1317, em Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em St Philip and St James' Church, Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.St Philip and St James Church, Groby, Le: ст филип анд ст джемес' чурч, гроби, лисестиршир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Segrave родилась около 1275 г. в местности чакомб, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Segrave 2nd Baron Segrave было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Christian Plessis, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Ferrers 1st Lord Ferrers of Groby в 1297 г. в местности гроби, лисестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла перед январь 1317 г. в местности гроби, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности ст филип анд ст джемес' чурч, гроби, лисестиршир, Англия.
